title: phegopteris xiphioides
intro: Phegopteris xiphioides, also known as the sword fern or mountain fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris xiphioides include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or powder, and may be consumed in tea or capsule form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
